message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Registration is Task #5, list is correct">
Steve — registration is there. It's Task #5: "User registration with session infrastructure (US-1)". The numbering shifted because the old Task #4 (registration) became the new "Base HTML template" task, and registration moved to #5. Here's the full confirmed list:

4. Base HTML template + static serving (NEW)
5. User registration + session infrastructure (US-1)
6. Login + Logout (US-2 + US-3)
7. View list + Add todo (US-4 + US-5)
8. Complete todo (US-6)
9. Delete todo (US-7)
20. Edit title (US-8) — should have
</teammate-message>

content.text: Got it. The list is complete and correct. I already confirmed this in my last message to the team lead. No further action needed on the task breakdown -- we're aligned and waiting for scaffolding to complete so Task #4 (base template) can start.
